home.title: Core — Optimising Human Performance in Safety-Critical Operations
home.description: Consulting and intelligent systems designed to improve safety, performance, and operational reliability across complex environments.

about.title: About
about.description: Consultancy and product business focused on human performance and operational excellence. Operating across the UK and Middle East.

whatYouCanGet.eyebrow: What You Can Get From Core
whatYouCanGet.title: Practical support. Measurable results.
whatYouCanGet.description: Specialist consulting and performance solutions designed to deliver immediate impact across safety-critical operations.

items.title: Continuous Improvement Programmes
items.desc: Lean-based improvement, KPI frameworks, and process optimisation that move the numbers.

items.title: ISO 9001 / 14001 / 45001 Readiness
items.desc: Gap analysis, implementation support and audit preparation for certified readiness.

items.title: Operational Audits & Reviews
items.desc: Operational audits, safety inspections and performance diagnostics with actionable insight.

items.title: Human Factors & Performance
items.desc: Fatigue, cognitive load, behavioural safety and task-based risk — the people layer.

items.title: Competency & Training Systems
items.desc: Competency frameworks, skill tracking and training programme development at scale.

items.title: Fatigue & Risk Management
items.desc: Evidence-led fatigue risk management for high-risk, continuous operations.

howCoreWorks.description: Core combines real-world operational experience with data-driven thinking to improve how organisations plan, manage, and deliver work. From frontline operations to strategic leadership.
howCoreWorks.overlayTitle: We operate where the work happens.

steps.title: Understand
steps.desc: Deep operational review rooted in frontline reality. We listen first, map the terrain, and define what success actually looks like.

steps.title: Align
steps.desc: We align people, performance and systems — so strategy does not stall at the frontline and decisions move faster.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.desc: Real operators. Data-driven methods. We focus on practical, measurable improvements you can evidence.

coreSystems.description: A modular suite of systems designed to transform how organisations manage workforce performance and risk.
coreSystems.hpeDesc: A next-generation system combining fatigue, competency, and performance data into one intelligent, modular platform.

sss.name: Smart Safety & Performance Station
sss.desc: Depot and site interface — digital sign-in, briefings, live KPIs and biometrics in one station.

sms.name: Environmental Risk & Sand Mitigation System
sms.desc: Wind and weather monitoring, sand risk analysis and early warnings — built for desert infrastructure.

hpeDemo.title: Compose the engine to your operation.
hpeDemo.description: The Human Performance Engine is modular by design. Toggle modules below to preview how they combine into a single operational view.

pilot.description: Core is onboarding a limited number of pilot partners across the UK and Middle East to support first-phase deployment of the Human Performance Engine — for organisations taking a proactive approach to safety, performance and efficiency through data-driven systems.
pilot.coverDesc: Defined objectives, timelines and review points to ensure measurable outcomes.
involves: Configuration of core modules (fatigue, competency, performance)
Integration with existing processes where possible
Ongoing refinement based on real-world use
Direct collaboration with Core during development
pilot.idealDesc: Organisations operating in safety-critical or high-risk environments, open to innovation, focused on measurable performance, and able to commit to collaboration during pilot.

benefits.title: Early Access
benefits.desc: Be among the first organisations to implement a next-generation human performance system before wider market release.

benefits.title: Preferred Commercial Terms
benefits.desc: Pilot partners receive favourable commercial arrangements in recognition of early adoption and collaboration.

benefits.title: Influence on Development
benefits.desc: Direct input into system functionality — ensuring alignment with real operational challenges and requirements.

benefits.title: Tailored Implementation
benefits.desc: The system will be adapted to your specific operational environment, rather than a one-size-fits-all approach.

benefits.title: Strategic Advantage
benefits.desc: Gain early insight into workforce performance trends, risk exposure and optimisation opportunities ahead of competitors.

pilot.ctaTitle: Ready to shape the next generation of performance systems?

about.title: A consultancy and product business — built by operators.
about.description: Core is focused on human performance and operational excellence in safety-critical environments. We blend director-level delivery experience with data-driven systems thinking.

services.title: Consulting that moves the numbers.
services.description: Core's primary engagement model — deep operational consulting across six capability areas, delivered by people who have run operations themselves.

products.title: A modular suite of systems for safety-critical operations.
products.description: Our product ecosystem is led by the Human Performance Engine — a next-generation platform combining fatigue, competency and performance into one intelligent system.

caseStudies.title: Real delivery. Real operational constraints.
caseStudies.description: Challenge. Action. Result. A selection of engagements where Core has led operational improvement in safety-critical environments.

contact.title: Start the conversation.
contact.description: Whether you're exploring a consulting engagement, a pilot partnership, or a new system — we're direct, operator-led, and quick to respond.

positioning.statement: A high-level consultancy and technology business focused on optimising human performance in safety-critical operations.

pillars.title: Human-centred outcomes
pillars.desc: We believe the most reliable route to safer, more efficient operations runs through the people doing the work.

pillars.title: Operator DNA
pillars.desc: We have carried the pager, closed the gap, turned around the project. Our frameworks are earned, not borrowed.

pillars.title: Measurable improvement
pillars.desc: Every engagement is judged on evidence and outcomes — not theoretical frameworks.

pillars.title: UK & Middle East
pillars.desc: Dual regional presence with deep context for the unique operational challenges of each market.

about.leadershipTitle: Operators at the top of the business.

darryl.name: Darryl
bullets: Expertise in operations, planning and performance

will.name: Will
bullets: Strategic partner supporting growth and development

regional.desc: From London to Dubai, Core operates across two of the most demanding regional markets for safety-critical delivery — bringing consistent methodology to diverse operational environments.

methodology.desc: We apply a structured, engagement-led approach to operational transformation — ensuring solutions are practical, scalable, and aligned with real-world needs. Every engagement combines human factors, compliance, and stakeholder engagement to deliver safe, efficient, and reliable operations in high-risk environments.

items.name: Human Factors & Performance
items.lead: The people layer — where safety and performance are really won.

items.name: Audits & Reviews
items.lead: See what the operation actually looks like — then act on it.

items.name: Continuous Improvement
items.lead: Lean discipline, KPI rigour, and process that moves the numbers.

items.name: Competency & Training
items.lead: People capability as a managed system, not a training log.

items.name: Specialist Advisory
items.lead: Director-level support where stakes are highest.

hpe.desc: A modular system designed to optimise workforce performance in safety-critical environments — combining fatigue, competency and performance data into one intelligent platform.
hpe.provenTitle: Born from a real operating system — award-winning.
hpe.provenDesc: The Human Performance Engine builds directly on the 24/7 digital fit-for-duty and control system deployed for a distributed Irish rail fleet — recognised with an industry award from Irish Rail.
hpe.cta1: Apply to Become a Pilot Partner

sss.title: Smart Safety & Performance Station
sss.desc: A depot and site interface built for the real-world interface between people and systems — sign-in, briefings, KPIs, biometrics, in one station.

sms.desc: Purpose-built for desert infrastructure environments. Wind and weather monitoring, sand risk analysis, and early warning alerts that keep operations running.
sms.provenTitle: Deployed for Abu Dhabi heavy-haul rail.
sms.provenDesc: The predictive, intelligence-led model at the core of this product was built and proven on a heavy-haul railway in Abu Dhabi — shifting operations from reactive sand clearance to near-eliminated weather-related delays.

bespoke.title: Bespoke Systems
bespoke.desc: Custom-built solutions shaped by your operational context and environmental constraints — from single-purpose tools to integrated platforms.

contact.statusBody: We operate across UK and Dubai business hours. Response within one business day for all direct enquiries.
